cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up after all those swaps. Let me start by writing down the initial positions. Initially: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Cheerleader - Eve: Goalkeeper Now, there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So, after this swap: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Cheerleader (since Dave was there) - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Right Midfielder (since Bob was there) - Eve:
